explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.findings: Articles detail GXO's use of machine learning to establish labor standards.
fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

relevant_sources.summary: This article provides evidence for **fairness**, **governance**, and **transparency** by detailing GXO's use of machine learning to establish labor standards. The source supports transparency by explaining how ML derives metrics from network-wide data and by discussing the potential for ML-generated standards to be lower. Furthermore, the article indicates governance through its description of ML deployment for workforce management and network-wide standards.
relevant_sources.title: GXO Direct to Use AI To Drive Labor Efficiencies

governance.findings: GXO highlights responsible AI integration as a strategic priority, mentioning the development of practical applications, pilot programs, and AI use for operational optimization. Reports detail the deployment of AI-driven automation and digital coaching systems, referencing a responsible AI adoption strategy with deployed policies and processes. Furthermore, articles describe machine learning deployment for workforce management and network-wide standards, and reference a partnership for AI systems.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. It highlights GXO's strategic priority of responsible AI integration, mentioning the development of practical applications, execution of pilot programs, and the use of AI for operational optimization, all of which suggest governance over AI initiatives. The report also implies transparency through its focus on AI R&D and deployment for operational insights.
relevant_sources.title: 2023 ESG Report

relevant_sources.summary: This press release for GXO IQ provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. It supports transparency by describing the AI's capabilities, purpose, and the technology stack, including proprietary AI algorithms and their predictive functions. The press release also demonstrates governance by detailing how these AI algorithms orchestrate millions of daily actions and are integrated into an AI-first platform.
relevant_sources.title: GXO Launches GXO IQ - AI-First Platform

relevant_sources.summary: The "GXO 2024 Impact Report" provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. The report details the deployment of AI-driven automation and digital coaching systems, indicating operational governance and transparency in their adoption. Furthermore, mentions of AI R&D, ongoing automation for security, and a responsible AI adoption strategy with deployed policies and processes demonstrate a commitment to governance over AI initiatives.
relevant_sources.title: GXO 2024 Impact Report

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for **governance** and **transparency** in responsible AI. The partnership with Robotic Assistance Devices, Inc. (RAD) implies vendor oversight and accountability for the AI systems being developed and deployed. Furthermore, the article highlights the launch of AI models, AI-powered predictive analytics, and a "physical AI stack," demonstrating transparency regarding the AI's capabilities and adoption plans.
relevant_sources.title: GXO partners with AI firm to roll out robotic security systems

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.findings: GXO provides transparency by describing the capabilities, purpose, and technology stack of its AI, including proprietary algorithms and their predictive functions. Reports detail the deployment of AI-driven automation and digital coaching systems, and articles highlight the launch of AI models and a "physical AI stack." Furthermore, information is provided on how machine learning derives metrics from network-wide data and the potential for ML-generated labor standards to be lower.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. It highlights GXO's strategic priority of responsible AI integration, mentioning the development of practical applications, execution of pilot programs, and the use of AI for operational optimization, all of which suggest governance over AI initiatives. The report also implies transparency through its focus on AI R&D and deployment for operational insights.
relevant_sources.title: 2023 ESG Report

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for the **transparency** pillar by describing the AI's role in self-training and performance improvement for depalletizing, labeling, and repalletizing packages. While it details the capabilities and operational benefits of the AI-enhanced robots, it does not offer information on the execution or specific policies governing their use.
relevant_sources.title: GXO pilots AI-enhanced robotics in warehouse

summary.overall_findings: GXO Logistics' public disclosures highlight operational practices in transparency, describing the AI's role in self-training and performance improvement for depalletizing, labeling, and repalletizing packages. Governance materials further mention the development of practical AI applications and the execution of pilot programs, with these two pillars representing the documented evidence for 2 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars. Drawing from 10 publicly available sources, no qualifying public evidence was found for the majority of the 7 evaluated pillars.
